/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvs_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libvs_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/vs_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vs_msgs/msg/detail/cone_location__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vs_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vs_msgs/msg/detail/cone_location_pixel__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vs_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vs_msgs/msg/detail/parking_error__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
